name: More and profile settings card refactor
description: Refactored protected More and Profile Settings into mobile-first shadcn card compositions wrapped by the shared PageShell. More now uses an icon-and-arrow shortcut list with root package version footer. Profile Settings now shows avatar, readonly account details/profile security, and account actions cards with reusable confirmation dialogs and no household membership section.

evidence.description: More page uses PageShell for the route title/header, imports the root package version, and renders the shortcut card plus version footer.
Shortcut-list card with left icons, right arrows, separators, and no keyboard shortcut key pills.
Profile Settings orchestrator renders loading, error, and success states inside PageShell, with avatar, profile details/security, and account actions cards without tabs or household membership data.
Frontend guide documents PageShell as the route-level app page layout contract and routes shell details to the responsive navigation shell reference.
Reusable ref-based confirm dialog with async confirm handling, destructive button variant support, busy-state dismissal guard, and explicit button types.
Focused source-contract coverage for More shortcuts, Profile Settings composition, PageShell usage, confirmation dialogs, deferred password UI safety, and FRONTEND PageShell docs.
Repository lint verification passed after implementation and review fixes.
Repository typecheck verification passed after implementation and review fixes.
Final full verification passed, including install, harness, lint, typecheck, test, and GitNexus sync steps.

evidence.command: playwright-cli mocked browser session against http://localhost:3000/more and /settings
evidence.description: More showed four icon/arrow shortcut rows and version 0.1.0. Settings showed avatar, profile/security, and account actions cards with no households; sign-out and delete buttons opened confirmation dialogs.

evidence.output: unavailable: MCP connection closed / Not connected after ./init.sh sync and final ./init.sh
evidence.description: Required GitNexus impact/change checks were attempted but the MCP connection remained unavailable after sync.
